name: MASH VP! Re:VISION
short_description: [Fusion, Synthesis, Coalescence]"MASH VP! Re:VISION" is a revolutionary rhythm game that “fuses” two lanes and music into a completely new experience.With a variety of tracks, game modes, and a creativity-driven mashup system, it invites you into a new world of music!
detailed_description:
■Game Description

"MASH VP! Re:VISION" is a rhythm game for Steam, built around the concept of "mashups"—a technique used in DJ performances where multiple tracks are blended together to create an entirely new song!

With over 150 playable tracks in the base game, including mashup songs, there’s plenty to enjoy!

On top of that, seasonal events like "VIRTUAL PATH" and "GHOST BATTLE Rank Match" offer even more fun long after your purchase!

1. An Extensive Lineup of Tracks

Enjoy tracks from world-renowned artists, including rhythm game legends and top creators from Japan, Korea, and the United States. Plus, tracks featuring popular vocalists add even more variety to the experience!

■Featured Artists (Partial List)

NAOKI / Tatsh / EmoCosine / NOMA / RiraN / Sakuzyo / Maozon / xi / TORIENA /

onoken / TAG / DJ Noriken / Quarkee / HyuN / SLAKE / Masayoshi Iimori / Nothing But Requiem / サイモンマン / 千本松 仁

■Featured Vocalists (Partial List)

小坂りゆ / nayuta / 月乃 / ななひら / 狛茉璃奈

2. Recreate Music Through Mashups

Experience the "MASH UP" Mode, where two tracks combine to form an entirely new song.

Experience the unique MASH UP mode, where you combine tracks played in FREE PLAY to create completely new songs.

Bring out the unique qualities of each track and enjoy a surprising and creative music experience!

In MASH UP Mode, the rhythm and melodies of each song naturally blend together, transforming them into something completely fresh and unique.

Popular songs like “Brain Power” and “Halcyon” can also be mashed up!

And as you level up, you may even discover a special 3-track mashup featuring "conflict"…!?

3. Innovative Two-Lane System!

This game features a unique "2-Line System", where notes flow from two separate routes. With just one button, both lines light up, creating an intuitive and immersive gameplay experience.

LIGHT MIX: A simple and intuitive two-lane style for beginners.

HARD MIX: A challenging and thrilling four-lane style for advanced players.

SINGLE LANE Mode has also been added!

Bringing back the classic music game experience, this is a mode where the lanes are always merged into one single lane.

With 7 types of charts, from beginner-friendly to advanced levels, you’ll find the perfect way to play.

4. Earn Rewards in the Content "VIRTUAL PATH"!

Complete special missions to earn rewards in VIRTUAL PATH, a event system!

Regularly updated events will let you unlock exclusive rewards and tracks, inspired by the world of the game and special collaborations.

5. Intense Battles Await in "GHOST BATTLE"!

Face off against ghost scores generated from player and friend playdata!

Friend Match – Compete against your friends' ghost data.

Random Match – Challenge random players from around the world.

Rank Match – A seasonal ranking mode where you compete against players of similar skill levels to climb the leaderboard! Earn exclusive rewards based on your final ranking at the end of each season.

6. Advanced Customization Support

Comprehensive Game Options

In addition to essential rhythm game options like high-speed settings and judgment timing adjustments, enjoy further options that ensure a comfortable experience.

Shift Effect Adjustment: Reduce camera shake and effects in DISPLAY OPTIONS. Whether you prefer full immersion or focused gameplay, the choice is yours.

Key Customization: Configure the key layout for optimal comfort, allowing you to create your own ideal play environment. Controller support is also available.

ASIO Audio Output Support

At AXTORM, every developer is a passionate rhythm gamer. We understand the importance of audio latency in rhythm games.

"MASH VP! Re:VISION" uses the FMOD audio engine and supports ASIO audio drivers, enabling low-latency gameplay.

Enjoy a seamless and immersive rhythm game experience with the best responsiveness and sound quality!

Now, embark on a journey into a new world of music!

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
